diagnostics.title: Invalid connection
diagnostics.repair_hint: Connect an output port to a compatible input port.

diagnostics.title: Required input missing
diagnostics.message: This machine cannot run because a required input is missing.

diagnostics.title: Power input missing
diagnostics.message: This machine cannot run because it does not have Power.
diagnostics.repair_hint: Connect Power from a Basic Generator.

diagnostics.title: Dirty Water output blocked
diagnostics.message: The Washer cannot continue because Dirty Water has nowhere to go.
diagnostics.repair_hint: Connect Dirty Water Output to a Waste Sink.

diagnostics.title: Objective requirement incomplete
diagnostics.message: This objective still has an incomplete requirement.
